name: Goodreads: Collect Book Reviews
summary: Collect community reviews for a book (author, rating, date, likes, body, URL). Supports login-free by-rating coverage (one ~30-review page per star, 5..1) and, when signed in, best-effort 'Show more reviews' pagination.
description: Navigates to <book>/reviews and extracts every loaded ReviewCard. coverage='page' (default) reads the first page (~30). coverage='by_rating' clicks each star bucket in the histogram (5,4,3,2,1) and collects each bucket's reviews, deduplicated by review URL — this is the login-free way to capture the full opinion spectrum including critical 1-2 star reviews (up to ~150 total). max_clicks additionally walks 'Show more reviews' within the current view, which only loads more when the operator's Chrome profile is signed in to Goodreads. Pure read.

book_url.description: Full Goodreads book URL, e.g. https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/29993569-raising-a-secure-child. The workflow appends /reviews automatically. Query strings and #anchors are ignored.

coverage.description: 'page' = first page only (~30, Goodreads' popular order). 'by_rating' = collect one page per star rating (5,4,3,2,1) and dedupe, capturing positive and critical reviews (up to ~150). Login-free.

max_clicks.description: Times to click 'Show more reviews' to load extra pages within the current view. Adds ~30 per successful click but only works when signed in to Goodreads; the loop stops as soon as a click adds nothing. Combine with coverage='by_rating' to go deep per star when signed in.

inputs.script: const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const origin=location.origin;const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const maxClicks=Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(cleanArg(arg0)||'0',10)||0,0),20);const coverage=(cleanArg(arg1)||'page').toLowerCase()==='by_rating'?'by_rating':'page';const dismiss=()=>{const dlg=document.querySelector(`[role='dialog'], .Overlay__window`);if(dlg){const x=Array.from(dlg.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b=>/close/i.test(b.getAttribute('aria-label')||''));if(x){x.click();}else{document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Escape',keyCode:27,bubbles:true}));}}};const findMore=()=>Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b=>/show more reviews/i.test(norm(b.textContent)));const paginate=async()=>{let c=0;for(let i=0;i<maxClicks;i++){const before=document.querySelectorAll('article.ReviewCard').length;const b=findMore();if(!b)break;b.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});b.click();await sleep(2200);dismiss();await sleep(400);c++;if(document.querySelectorAll('article.ReviewCard').length<=before)break;}return c;};const clickStar=(n)=>{const want=n+' star';const el=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.RatingsHistogram__labelTitle')).find(e=>norm(e.textContent).startsWith(want));if(el){el.click();return true;}return false;};const applyStar=async(n)=>{if(!clickStar(n))return false;for(let i=0;i<12;i++){await sleep(600);const cards=document.querySelectorAll('article.ReviewCard');if(cards.length){const a=cards[0].querySelector(`[aria-label*='out of 5']`)?.getAttribute('aria-label')||'';const m=a.match(/(\d)\s*out of/i);if(m&&m[1]===String(n))return true;}}return true;};const map=new Map();const extractInto=()=>{for(const card of document.querySelectorAll('article.ReviewCard')){const al=card.getAttribute('aria-label')||'';const author=norm((al.match(/^Review by (.+)$/i)||[])[1])||norm(card.querySelector('.ReviewerProfile__name a')?.textContent);const ra=card.querySelector(`[aria-label*='out of 5']`)?.getAttribute('aria-label')||'';const rm=ra.match(/(\d)\s*out of/i);const row=card.querySelector('.ReviewCard__row a');const date=norm(row?.textContent);const rp=(row?.getAttribute('href')||'').match(/\/review\/show\/\d+/);const review_url=rp?origin+rp[0]:'N/A';const body=norm(card.querySelector('.TruncatedContent__text')?.textContent);const lk=(card.textContent.match(/(\d[\d,]*)\s+likes?/i)||[])[1];const obj={author:author||'N/A',rating:rm?rm[1]:'N/A',date:date||'N/A',likes:lk?lk.replace(/,/g,''):'0',body:body?body.slice(0,700):'N/A',review_url:review_url};const key=rp?rp[0]:(obj.author+'|'+obj.date+'|'+obj.body.slice(0,40));if(map.has(key))continue;map.set(key,obj);}};for(let i=0;i<8;i++){if(document.querySelectorAll('article.ReviewCard').length)break;window.scrollTo(0,document.body.scrollHeight);await sleep(700);}let totalClicks=0;const facets=[];if(coverage==='by_rating'){for(const n of [1,2,3,4,5]){await applyStar(n);totalClicks+=await paginate();const sz=map.size;extractInto();facets.push({rating:String(n),collected:String(map.size-sz)});}}else{totalClicks=await paginate();extractInto();}let total='N/A';try{const d=JSON.parse(document.getElementById('__NEXT_DATA__').textContent);const gr=d.props.pageProps.apolloState.ROOT_QUERY.getReviews;if(gr&&gr.totalCount!=null)total=String(gr.totalCount);}catch(e){}const all=[...map.values()];let outReviews;if(coverage==='by_rating'){const byR={};for(const r of all){(byR[r.rating]=byR[r.rating]||[]).push(r);}outReviews=[];for(const n of ['1','2','3','4','5','N/A']){for(const r of (byR[n]||[]).slice(0,10))outReviews.push(r);}}else{outReviews=all.slice(0,50);}return {reviews_url:location.href.replace(/[?#].*$/,''),total_count:total,coverage:coverage,facets:facets,pagination_clicks:totalClicks,reviews_loaded:all.length,reviews_returned:outReviews.length,reviews:outReviews};

steps.name: Collect reviews (page or by-rating coverage; best-effort pagination)

help.summary: Collect community reviews; login-free by-rating coverage, plus signed-in deep pagination.

parameters.book_url: Full Goodreads /book/show/ URL (/reviews is appended automatically).
parameters.coverage: 'page' (first ~30) or 'by_rating' (one page per star 5..1, deduped, ~150 max). Login-free.
parameters.max_clicks: Times to click 'Show more reviews' within the current view (0-20). Only effective when signed in to Goodreads.

examples.description: Full opinion spectrum incl. critical reviews (login-free)
Signed in: walk deep within each star bucket
examples.command: rzn-browser run goodreads reviews --param book_url="https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/29993569-raising-a-secure-child" --param coverage="by_rating" --param max_clicks="10"

returns: Object: { reviews_url, total_count, coverage, facets: [{ rating, collected }], pagination_clicks, reviews_loaded, reviews_returned, reviews: [{ author, rating, date, likes, body, review_url }] }. reviews_loaded is how many were seen; reviews_returned is how many are in the array. Deduplicated by review URL. total_count is Goodreads' reported text-review total.
notes: coverage='by_rating' clicks each histogram star bucket (works logged out, no sign-up wall) and is the recommended way to capture both praise and criticism for opinion synthesis.

The execute_javascript result bridge caps a returned array at ~50 items, so by_rating returns a balanced sample of up to 10 reviews per star bucket (critical ratings first), even though reviews_loaded counts every review seen. body is trimmed to 700 chars.

Logged out, 'Show more reviews' opens a sign-up wall and loads nothing, so max_clicks is a no-op; each star bucket still yields its first ~30. Signed in, each click loads ~30 more within the active bucket.
rating is 'N/A' for cards where the reviewer wrote text but left no star rating.
